visual: Explosive Chen-style fā jìn release: coils back then launches a fast straight punch from a bow stance with the opposite hand pulling sharply to the hip.
motion_description: The movement begins with a firm right foot step down into a wide stance. The torso coils to the right as the right hand is drawn back into a fist at the waist, while the left arm remains extended forward. In an explosive sequence, the waist rotates forward to drive a fast, straight right punch at chest height, simultaneously snapping the left hand back to the left hip and shifting the weight forcefully onto the bent right leg.
